title: troxirum quadrifolium
intro: Troxirum quadrifolium, also known as the four-leafed troxirum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of troxirum quadrifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Troxirum quadrifolium is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
